seoTitle: Parkhurst vs Parklands — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Parkhurst and Parklands. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Parkhurst and Parklands.
heading: Parkhurst vs Parklands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Parkhurst, Queensland and Parklands, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Parkhurst has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Parklands (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Parkhurst or Parklands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Parkhurst has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Parklands scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Parkhurst scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Parklands scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Parkhurst or Parklands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Parkhurst has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
